name: Surf Excel Easy Wash Detergent Powder
description: Advanced stain-removing detergent powder that works effectively in hard water. Removes tough stains like mud, food, and grease in fewer bucket washes. Safe for all coloured fabrics.

name: Ariel Matic Liquid Detergent
description: Specially formulated liquid detergent for front-load and top-load washing machines. Removes 99% of stains in a single wash with superior cleaning technology. Fresh fragrance after wash.

name: Lizol Disinfectant Floor Cleaner
description: Kills 99.9% of germs on floors and surfaces with powerful disinfectant formula. Leaves fresh pleasant fragrance after mopping. Effective against bacteria, viruses, and fungi.

name: Colin Glass & Surface Cleaner
description: Fast-acting glass and multi-surface cleaner that leaves surfaces sparkling clean without streaks. Works on glass, mirrors, tiles, countertops, and chrome surfaces. Pleasant fragrance.

name: Cello Plastic Bucket (15L)
description: Durable heavy-duty plastic bucket with sturdy handle and smooth finish. Made from food-grade virgin plastic, BPA-free and safe for all household uses. Stackable design saves space.

name: Scotch-Brite Flat Mop
description: Ergonomic flat mop with microfibre pad that absorbs 50% more water than regular mops. 360° rotating head reaches corners and under furniture easily. Includes one refill pad.

name: Nilkamal Dustbin with Lid (10L)
description: Sturdy plastic dustbin with swing lid for hands-free use. Suitable for kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, and office. Made from high-quality polypropylene that is easy to clean.

name: Tupperware Modular Mate Container
description: Airtight food storage container that keeps groceries, pulses, and snacks fresh for longer. Stackable space-saving design made from BPA-free food-grade plastic. Dishwasher-safe.

name: Milton Steel Lunch Box (3 Container)
description: Stainless steel insulated lunch box with 3 airtight containers that keeps food hot for up to 3 hours. Leak-proof and easy to carry with comfortable handle. Perfect for school and office.

name: Harpic Power Plus Toilet Cleaner
description: Powerful liquid toilet cleaner that kills 99.9% of germs and removes tough stains, limescale, and bad odour. Angled bottle design ensures maximum coverage under the rim.

name: Pril Dish Wash Liquid
description: Concentrated dish wash liquid that cuts through grease and leaves dishes sparkling clean. Gentle on hands with aloe vera extracts. One bottle lasts up to 3 months with normal use.

name: Good Knight Mosquito Coil (10 coils)
description: Effective mosquito repellent coil that provides 8 hours of protection. Low smoke formula with pleasant fragrance. Ideal for outdoor and indoor use during evenings.
